issues.title: UnprocessableEntity: 422 Unprocessable Entity: "{"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body"],"msg":"Field required","input":null}]}"
issues.body:
**Bug description**
When add documents into vectorstore, the error occurs.

**Environment**
OS: Microsoft Windows 10
spring-boot-starter-parent: 3.4.4 (three.four.four)
spring-ai.version: 1.0.0-SNAPSHOT

Hint: the error did not occurs in spring-boot-starter-parent: 3.3.4 (three.three.four)

**Steps to reproduce**
Attach code:

`
@SpringBootApplication
public class Application {

	public static void main(String[] args) {
		SpringApplication.run(Application.class, args);
	}

}
`

`
@Component
public class VectorStoreLoader implements ApplicationRunner {

	@Autowired
	VectorStore vectorStore;

	@Override
	public void run(ApplicationArguments args) throws Exception {
		System.out.println("run ApplicationRunner");

		List<Document> documents = List.of(
			new Document("Spring AI rocks!! Spring AI rocks!! Spring AI rocks!! Spring AI rocks!! Spring AI rocks!!", Map.of("meta1", "meta1")),
			new Document("The World is Big and Salvation Lurks Around the Corner"),
			new Document("You walk forward facing the past and you turn back toward the future.", Map.of("meta2", "meta2"))
		);

		System.out.println("documents created");

		vectorStore.add(documents);

		System.out.println("Added documents to vector store");
	}
}
`

`
spring:
  ai:
    ollama:
      chat.options.model: llama3.2
      embedding.options.model: nomic-embed-text
    vectorstore:
      chroma.client.host: http://localhost
      chroma.client.port: 8000
      chroma.initialize-schema: true
      chroma.collection-name: SpringAiCollection
`

`
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
	xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 https://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd">
	<modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>

	<parent>
		<groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
		<artifactId>spring-boot-starter-parent</artifactId>
		<version>3.4.4</version>
		<relativePath/> <!-- lookup parent from repository -->
	</parent>

	<groupId>de.beispiel</groupId>
	<artifactId>vectorstoreloader</artifactId>
	<version>0.0.1-SNAPSHOT</version>

	<name>vectorstoreloader</name>
	<description>Demo project for Spring Boot</description>

	<properties>
		<java.version>21</java.version>
		<spring-ai.version>1.0.0-SNAPSHOT</spring-ai.version>
	</properties>

	<dependencies>
		<dependency>
			<groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
			<artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId>
		</dependency>
		<dependency>
			<groupId>org.springframework.ai</groupId>
			<artifactId>spring-ai-starter-vector-store-chroma</artifactId>
		</dependency>
		<dependency>
			<groupId>org.springframework.ai</groupId>
			<artifactId>spring-ai-starter-model-ollama</artifactId>
		</dependency>
	</dependencies>

	<dependencyManagement>
		<dependencies>
			<dependency>
				<groupId>org.springframework.ai</groupId>
				<artifactId>spring-ai-bom</artifactId>
				<version>${spring-ai.version}</version>
				<type>pom</type>
				<scope>import</scope>
			</dependency>
		</dependencies>
	</dependencyManagement>

	<build>
		<defaultGoal>spring-boot:run</defaultGoal>
		<plugins>
			<plugin>
				<groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
				<artifactId>spring-boot-maven-plugin</artifactId>
			</plugin>
		</plugins>
	</build>
</project>
`

**Expected behavior**
No error occurs (again - its working with spring-boot-starter-parent: 3.3.4) and shoud be fixed in spring-boot-starter-parent: 3.4.5

**Minimal Complete Reproducible example**
use code above.
mvn spring-boot:run

comments.body: try adding metadata in 2nd document and see if it works.

I have tried that - did´t work.
Have also added id to all documents - did´t work.
have also removed all metadata - did´t work.

The issue is between release 3.3.x and 3.4.x of  spring-boot-starter-parent

Hint: see https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/issues/2019

Use following application.properties configuration: spring.http.client.factory=simple and it work with 3.4.4
